case_title: CHRISTOPHER SNIDER ET AL VS. CITY-CORE DEVELOPMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,579.71 FILED BY SNIDER, CHRISTOPHER WINTOR-SNIDER, DORA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY-CORE DEVELOPMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SNIDER, CHRISTOPHER CITY-CORE DEVELOPMENT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 91.25 SERVED MAY-23-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY-CORE DEVELOPMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER SNIDER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DORA WINTOR-SNIDER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY-CORE DEVELOPMENT, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RICHARD KAUFMAN, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES CONTINUANCE TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE AND WISHES TO PROCEED TODAY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDATS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY-CORE DEVELOPMENT, INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SNIDER, CHRISTOPHER WINTOR-SNIDER, DORA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY-CORE DEVELOPMENT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-04-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
